_comment: Seed list for local dev/demo only. In production, populate this from the Tranco Top 1M or Cisco Umbrella list (per blueprint Section 1) via scripts/refresh_lists.py, and store it in Redis/a DB, not a file re-deployed with the app. This file's staleness is exactly the risk the audit flagged - it must be refreshed on a schedule, not edited by hand. NOTE: this list serves TWO purposes - the allowlist fast-path AND the set of protected brands core/typosquat.py checks against, so expanding it improves both at once. Coverage gaps here directly become typosquat blind spots (found via testing: flipkart.com and instagram.com weren't in this list, so their typosquats went undetected even though the algorithm itself was capable of catching them).
source: manually seeded for demo - replace with Tranco Top 1M sync
